summary: DHH announces that 'Agile Web Development with Rails' is rapidly climbing Amazon's bestseller charts, reaching 3rd place in computer books. The first printing is nearly sold out. He urges readers to order quickly due to a worldwide paper shortage that may delay the second printing, while noting the PDF version remains available.
key_points: The Rails book jumped from 6th to 3rd in Amazon's computer books category and from #408 to #248 overall
The first printing is almost sold out, indicating strong early demand for Rails content
A worldwide paper shortage may delay the second printing
money_quotes: That's an amazing run out the gates and means that the first printing is almost sold out!
There's no running out of the PDF, of course, so you can always order that and the print book to be shipped as soon as the second run is ready.
key_insight: The rapid sellout of the first Rails book signaled the framework's breakout moment from niche tool to mainstream developer interest.
